offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual compilation causes delays in payment processing. We automate vendor payment summaries instead of manual spreadsheets and email communication.
problem: Manual compilation of vendor payment summaries is time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing accounting tools
try_it: Let users try email notifications and a tracking dashboard for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
